proxy_only_fail_closed_rule: A proxy metric can be an indicator only. If the proxy improves while the continuation function, declared basin signature, support floor, coherence floor, boundary condition, or flux condition fails, the primitive is not supported.
purpose: Define bounded continuation-function, proxy metric, and support/scaffold contracts for each N20 becoming primitive without testing or supporting primitive evidence.
